channel.title: SPL - Online Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Online Events

item.title: Virtual Consult: Intellectual Property Law
item.description:
Tuesday, March 24, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Online

Does your small business or nonprofit need help navigating intellectual property issues, such as patents or trademarks?

Event details

item.title: Virtual Workshop - Become a Small Business Owner Through Franchising
item.description:
Monday, March 30, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Online

If you are considering franchising as a career option, or actively working towards a franchise agreement, this program is for you.  

Event details
